response.justification: The candidate's resume lacks direct experience in hardware-software co-design, SoC/IP modeling, or AI accelerator optimization, which are core to the Principal Performance Architect role. While they have strong software engineering skills and performance tuning experience, their background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development, embedded systems, and general software infrastructure rather than AI/ML hardware or cloud infrastructure optimization for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with expertise in multiple languages and frameworks
Experience with performance optimization and system architecture design
Proven ability to contribute to complex systems and deliver scalable solutions
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design
Limited background in AI accelerator optimization or deep-learning workload analysis
Lacks the required depth in hardware architecture or cloud infrastructure for AI hardware
